audit_items.proof_trace: Every pointer dereference in free.c is guarded: `ber_memfree_x` and `ber_memvfree_x` each contain an explicit NULL return-early check (memory.c:128-130, 173-175); `ber_strdup_x` returns NULL with errno if `s==NULL` (memory.c:637-640); `ldap_mods_free` checks `mods==NULL` before iteration and guards all field accesses inside the loop (free.c:85-86, 90, 93, 97). No dereference occurs without a prior null guard.
